Package model

Class VillageModelManager

java.lang.Object
model.VillageModelManager
public class VillageModelManager extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    One-argument constructor; The constructor initializez filename and the JSON parser

    Replaces an existing trade offer with an updated one Validates that neither the old nor the new trade is null then updates the trade in the village and saves the changes

    Changes a villager from the Village

    Finish a GreenActivity from GreenActivities

    Method removes the GreenGoal from the JsonFile
    void
    finishTrade(TradeOffer trade, Villager buyer)
    Finalizes a trade by giving the required trades point to the villager offering it and by removing the required trades points from the villager buying it

  • Constructor Details

    • VillageModelManager

      public VillageModelManager(String fileName)
      One-argument constructor; The constructor initializez filename and the JSON parser
      Parameters:
      fileName - the VillageModelManager fileName

  • Method Details

    • getVillage

      public Village getVillage()
      Reads the Village from binary
      Returns:
      village using MyFileHandler class

    • saveVillage

      public void saveVillage(Village village)
      Saves the village to binary
      Parameters:
      village - the Village's village using MyFileHandler class

    • getVillagers

      public ArrayList<Villager> getVillagers()
      Gets the Village villagers
      Returns:
      the ArrayList of Villagers from village calls Village.getVillagers()

    • addVillager

      public void addVillager(Villager villager)
      Adds a villager to the Village
      Parameters:
      villager - Village villager calls Village.addVillager()

    • removeVillager

      public void removeVillager(Villager villager)
      Removes a villager from the Village
      Parameters:
      villager - Village villager calls Village.removeVillager()

    • changeVillager

      public void changeVillager(Villager old, Villager villager)
      Changes a villager from the Village
      Parameters:
      old - Village villager
      villager - Village villager Method takes the parameters of the villager and replace the old villager parameters calls Village.changeVillager()

    • getSharedTasks

      public ArrayList<SharedTask> getSharedTasks()
      Returns:
      an arraylist of all shared tasks calls Village.getSharedTasks()

    • addSharedTask

      public void addSharedTask(SharedTask sharedtask)
      Adds a shared task to the arraylist of shared tasks
      Parameters:
      sharedtask - shared task to be added to the list calls Village.addSharedTask()

    • setVillageDescription

      public void setVillageDescription(String description)
      Set a Village description
      Parameters:
      description - (String) calls Village.setDescription()

    • getTrades

      public ArrayList<TradeOffer> getTrades()
      Gets all the available trades present in the village
      Returns:
      an arraylist of all the available trades present in the village calls Village.getTrades()

    • addTrade

      public void addTrade(TradeOffer trade)
      Adds a trade to the arraylist of trades present in the village
      Parameters:
      trade - the trade that is added calls Village.addTradeOffer() also reads from JSON and appends new trade to it and saves it

    • removeTrade

      public void removeTrade(TradeOffer trade)
      Removes a trade from the arraylist of trades present in the village
      Parameters:
      trade - the trade that is Removed calls Village.removeTrade()

    • changeTrade

      public void changeTrade(TradeOffer old, TradeOffer trade)
      Replaces an existing trade offer with an updated one Validates that neither the old nor the new trade is null then updates the trade in the village and saves the changes
      Parameters:
      old - the trade that is seleceted to be edited
      trade - the trade after the changes calls Village.editTradeOffer()

    • finishTrade

      public void finishTrade(TradeOffer trade, Villager buyer)
      Finalizes a trade by giving the required trades point to the villager offering it and by removing the required trades points from the villager buying it
      Parameters:
      trade - the trade to finalize and do the points exchange
      buyer - the village who buys the trade and from whom the points will be substracted calls Village.finishTradeOffer()

    • addResetDay

      public void addResetDay(int days)
      Adds a period of time in days when all the vilagers personal points will be reseted
      Parameters:
      days - the interval of time set calls Village.addResetPeriod()

    • resetNow

      public void resetNow()
      Resets the personal points of all the villagers and transfers them in the community green pool calls Village.resetnow()

    • getGoals

      public ArrayList<GreenGoal> getGoals()
      Gets the ArrayList of goals from Village
      Returns:
      the ArrayList of goals from Village

    • addGoal

      public void addGoal(GreenGoal goal)
      Adds a goal to the Village
      Parameters:
      goal - GreenGoal goal

    • removeGreenGoal

      public void removeGreenGoal(GreenGoal goal)
      removes a goal to the Village
      Parameters:
      goal - GreenGoal goal

    • changeGreenGoal

      public void changeGreenGoal(GreenGoal old, GreenGoal goal)
      Changes a GreenGoal from goals
      Parameters:
      old - Village GreenGoal
      goal - Village GreenGoal Method takes a GreenGoal and replace the old GreenGoal parameters

    • getActivities

      public ArrayList<GreenActivity> getActivities()
      Get the ArrayList of GreenActivities
      Returns:
      allGreenActivities

    • addGreenActivity

      public void addGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenActivity)
      Add a GreenActivity to the ArrayList of GreenActivities
      Parameters:
      greenActivity - GreenActivity

    • removeGreenActivity

      public void removeGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenActivity)
      Add a GreenActivity to the ArrayList of GreenActivities
      Parameters:
      greenActivity - GreenActivity

    • changeGreenActivity

      public void changeGreenActivity(GreenActivity old, GreenActivity greenActivity)
      Changes a GreenActivity from GreenActivities
      Parameters:
      old - Village greenActivity
      greenActivity - Village greenActivity Method takes a GreenActivity and replace the old GreenActivity parameters

    • finishGreenActivity

      public void finishGreenActivity(GreenActivity greenActivity)
      Finish a GreenActivity from GreenActivities
      Parameters:
      greenActivity - Village greenActivity Method takes a GreenActivity's points and adds the points to the Goal

      LoadsGreenActivityList to JSON

      Parameters:
      greenGoal - the GreenGoal to save

      public void loadGreenGoalListJson()
      LoadsGreenGoalList to JSON

      public void loadSavedGreenGoalJson(GreenGoal activeGoal)
      LoadsSavedGoalList to JSON Method puts in a JSON file just the active GreenGoal
      Parameters:
      activeGoal - the GreenGoal to save

      public void loadVillageDescription()
      LoadsVillage Description to JSON
